query: SELECT id, location, reportType, reportDate, totalScore, status, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as created FROM report_submissions WHERE reportDate = '2026-03-03' ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
